title: IndusInd Bank Digital Technologies is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Entry-Level)

jsonLd.title: IndusInd Bank Digital Technologies is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Entry-Level)
jsonLd.description:
IndusInd Bank Digital Technologies invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Credit Analyst at our Mysuru location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About IndusInd Bank Digital Technologies:
IndusInd Bank Digital Technologies is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage accounts payable and accounts receivable functions
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Maintain general ledger and ensure accurate bookkeeping
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Ensure compliance with tax regulations and statutory requirements

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Master's degree preferred
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Power BI
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Learning & development budget
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Mysuru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with IndusInd Bank Digital Technologies!
